series_metadata.series_description: A form filled out to request funding for a customer, includes the customer's name, address, contract number, social security number and amount to be paid. (Refunds and Electronic Funds Transfer Fees are included in this type of form.) Confidential - Revised Code 3334.11

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Electronic files are kept life of contract ; Paper: Store on site audit, store off-site
